Deltona Home Loans

FHA loans in Deltona, Florida

Deltona is one of Volusia County's largest and most affordable cities, sitting conveniently between Orlando and Daytona Beach. Its base of single-family homes at attainable prices makes it a popular landing spot for first-time buyers and commuters — and a natural FHA market, where the statewide loan limit comfortably covers local homes and 3.5% down opens the door.

Volusia County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Deltona

With the 2026 FHA limit of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Deltona home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). In Deltona's affordable market, that covers the vast majority of homes for sale. A few Florida counties are set higher, so confirm Volusia County's exact figure with HUD.

Affordable, commuter-friendly homeownership in Deltona

Deltona's value and central location — within reach of both Orlando and Daytona jobs — make it ideal for first-time buyers using FHA's low 3.5% down. Many homes sit well under the loan limit, and older homes that need updates can be financed with an FHA 203(k) renovation loan. Pair FHA with Florida assistance and gift funds to keep cash to close low.

Down payment help for Deltona buyers

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Deltona buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Volusia County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Neighborhoods we serve in Deltona

We help buyers throughout Deltona and Volusia County, including Deltona Lakes and the communities near Orange City and Lake Monroe. Wherever you're looking, we'll explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment — and get you pre-approved fast.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Deltona (Volusia County) for 2026?+
Volusia County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers nearly all Deltona homes. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
How much home can I buy with FHA in Deltona?+
With the $541,287 limit and 3.5% down, you can finance a home up to roughly $560,000 — well above the typical Deltona price.
Is Deltona good for first-time buyers?+
Yes — affordable prices and a location between Orlando and Daytona make it a strong first-time FHA market.
How much down payment do I need in Deltona?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Volusia County?+
Yes — Deltona, Daytona Beach, DeLand, and surrounding communities.
